summary: Completed testing of xicon-style chat input area with camera/image upload feature. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (including new /api/chat/image endpoint). Frontend: All new features working - xicon layout (mic, input with camera inside, send), image picker modal (Camera/Gallery options), text chat with AI response, TTS toggle, back button navigation, two avatars (Miron/Oksana) in header.
critical_code_review_comments: ChatPage.jsx properly implements xicon-style input area with mic (left), input with camera inside (center), send (right)
Image picker modal correctly shows Camera and Gallery options with proper styling
POST /api/chat/image endpoint properly handles base64 image and returns Claude vision analysis
useChat.js exports setMessages for image upload flow
CSS uses xc- prefix for all chat-related styles (xc-chat-modal, xc-image-picker-modal, etc.)
Two avatars (Miron/Oksana) displayed in header with names and online dots
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded automatically on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Xicon-style chat input area with image upload verified. All features working: (1) Input layout: mic button (left), input field with camera icon inside (center), send button (right); (2) Camera button opens image picker modal with Camera/Gallery options; (3) Gallery option triggers file picker; (4) POST /api/chat/image endpoint returns AI analysis via Claude vision; (5) Two avatars (Miron/Oksana) in header with names; (6) Background wallpaper visible; (7) Speaker button on AI messages; (8) TTS toggle works; (9) Back button navigates to /problems. All existing pages (Landing, Auth, Problems, Voice Select) still working.
